fields.title: Main Square
fields.body: You are in the bustling main square of the town. Merchants cry out their wares, and citizens hurry about their daily lives. A large notice board stands in the center, and the local tavern is just a short walk away.

fields.title: Notice Board
fields.body: The wooden notice board is covered in weathered parchments. Most are mundane requests for farm help or lost pets, but one catches your eye: a bounty for investigating the Haunted Mine.

fields.title: The Rusty Tankard
fields.body: The air in the tavern is thick with the smell of roasted meat and spilled ale. A bard plays a lively tune in the corner, and the fire in the hearth provides a welcoming warmth.

fields.label: Check the notice board
fields.arrival_flavor: You walk over to the central notice board.

fields.label: Go to the tavern
fields.arrival_flavor: You push open the heavy oak doors of the tavern.

fields.label: Return to the main square
fields.arrival_flavor: You step away from the notice board.

fields.label: Return to the main square
fields.arrival_flavor: You leave the warmth of the tavern and head back out into the square.

fields.label: The Haunted Mine
fields.arrival_flavor: You accept the quest and head towards the old iron mine.
